creator: col@rsmmail.com
text:
FreeBSD will not install in UEFI mode on any 3010,7010, or 9010 Dell computer.
Been trying for a long time and devs never responds to this issue because they don't have a clue what to do. I tried FreeBSD 10, 11, and 12 with no luck.
But any other Linux distro and Windows installs fine.
